message:
fix(lab): sort closed-fault HUP tokens for deterministic delivery

The lab reactor's poll() iterated a HashMap<Token, VirtualSocket> to
emit HUP events for closed-fault tokens. HashMap iteration order is
non-deterministic, violating the "same seed → same behavior" contract.
When multiple tokens had closed faults simultaneously, their HUPs
could be delivered in different orders across runs.

Fix: collect closed-fault tokens into a sorted Vec before appending
HUP events to delivered_events.

Also records batch 426: 22 files (~46K lines) including cx/cx.rs,
cx/registry.rs, cx/scope.rs, runtime/state.rs, remote.rs, types/cancel.rs,
time/wheel.rs, bytes/{bytes,bytes_mut}, browser_stream.rs, and more.
All SOUND.

Grand total: 36 bugs fixed, 215+ files audited, ~290K+ lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
